title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING AN AGRICULTURAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY DOLORES, MUNICIPALITY OF PINABACDAO, PROVINCE OF SAMAR, TO BE KNOWN AS THE WEST COAST AGRICULTURAL HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 25142 / 87 OG No. 34, 4890 (Aug. 26, 1991)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7053, June 19, 1991 ]

AN ACT ESTABLISHING AN AGRICULTURAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY DOLORES, MUNICIPALITY OF PINABACDAO, PROVINCE OF SAMAR, TO BE KNOWN AS THE WEST COAST AGRICULTURAL HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. There shall be established an agricultural high school in Barangay Dolores, Municipality of Pinabacdao, Province of Samar, to be known as the West Coast Agricultural High School.

SEC. 2. The Secretary of the Department of Education, Culture and Sports shall issue such rules and regulations as may be necessary to carry out the purpose of this Act.

SEC. 3. The amount necessary to carry out the provisions of this Act is hereby authorized to be appropriated in the General Appropriations Act of the year following its enactment into law and thereafter.

SEC. 4. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JOVITO R. SALONGA

(Sgd.) RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated from the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on November 20, 1989 and March 14, 1991, respectively.

(Sgd.) EDWIN P. ACOBA

(Sgd.) CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: June 19, 1991

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
